content.cn_text: 领导:大家好。
content.en_text: Leader: Hello everyone.

content.cn_text: 今天下午我想跟大家谈谈下个月去塔默顿学习中心的两周课程。
content.en_text: I've been asked to talk to you this afternoon about next month's trip to Tamerton Study Centre for the two-week course.

content.cn_text: 现在来看一些东西
content.en_text: Now some of the things

content.cn_text: 我要说的是，你们可能已经听说过或读到过……但我认为有必要强调几个关键点。
content.en_text: I'm going say you may have already heard or read about ... but I think it's important to emphasise a few key points.

content.cn_text: 首先，值得提醒你的是，塔默顿最初成立的原因……在20世纪60年代末。
content.en_text: First of all, it's worth reminding you why Tamerton was set up in the first place ... in the late nineteen sixties.

content.cn_text: 那真的是在所有关注保护环境之前，现在每个人都在谈论环境。
content.en_text: That was really before all the concern with preserving the environment which everyone talks about these days.

content.cn_text: 问题11:我们的想法很简单，就是让人们走出城市，来到乡村，让他们发现，户外活动也是非常有益的。
content.en_text: The idea was simply to get people out of the cities and into the country and to find out that just being outdoors can be very rewarding.

content.cn_text: 这不是通常意义上的节日。
content.en_text: This is not going to be a holiday in the usual sense.

content.cn_text: 它被称为冒险课程，因为你真的会被拉伸到你的极限，但这本身就是一件积极的事情。例如，我去年参加的小组说，尽管他们实际上一直感到非常虚弱和疲惫，但这确实让他们了解了很多自己，增加了他们的信心……最后，这才是最重要的。
content.en_text: It's called an adventure course because you'll really be stretched to your limits but that in itself can be a positive thing.The group I took last year, for example, said that although they actually felt pretty weak and exhausted all the time, it really made them learn a lot about themselves and increased their confidence ... and in the end that's the most important thing.

content.cn_text: 你们所有人在报名之前都知道塔默顿保险公司的政策，所以你们知道它在很多方面都很过时——你在做什么方面没有太多选择。但是我认为让这个地方如此特别的是，你每天都可以尝试很多不同的东西。
content.en_text: Now all of you knew about policies at Tamerton before you signed up for it, so you know that in many ways it's quite old fashioned - you don't have a lot of choice in what you do.But something which I think makes the place so special is that you get to try so many different things, every day.

content.cn_text: 例如，今天你要攀岩，明天你要测量岩石池。
content.en_text: For instance, one day you'll do climbing and the next you'll be surveying rock pools.

content.cn_text: 并不是说你要成为其中任何一个方面的专家……它更像是一个品尝器，如果你想的话可以继续。
content.en_text: It's not intended that you become an expert in any of them... it's more like a taster, which you can follow up if you want.

content.cn_text: 而且没有很多空闲时间……组织活动、讲座等。
content.en_text: And there isn't a lot of free time ... organised activities and talks, etc.

content.cn_text: 一直开到晚上9点，11点熄灯。
content.en_text: go on until nine p.m.and lights go out at eleven p.m.

content.cn_text: 那里有乒乓球桌和所有的设备，还有棋盘游戏，不过我不得不说，棋子经常会丢失，所以最好自己带着。
content.en_text: There are table tennis tables, with all the equipment, and board games, though I have to say the pieces often go missing so it's a good idea to take your own.

content.cn_text: 有一个DVD播放机，里面有很多适合这个年龄段的电影，所以不要带你的。
content.en_text: There's a DVD player with a good selection of films suitable for this age group so don't take yours.

content.cn_text: 晚上11点睡觉是严格规定的。这是有原因的。
content.en_text: Bed-time at eleven p.m. is strictly enforced ... and there's a good reason for this.

content.cn_text: 你们都未满18岁，我们组织者需要知道所有的小组成员在晚上结束时都在房子里。
content.en_text: You're all under eighteen and we organisers need to know that all group members are accounted for in the house as we close for the night.

content.cn_text: 当然，无论如何你都会筋疲力尽，困得不想惹麻烦。
content.en_text: And of course you'll be so exhausted anyway that you'll be too sleepy to want to cause any trouble.

content.cn_text: 领导:现在，你应该带些什么?
content.en_text: Leader: Now, what should you pack?

content.cn_text: 这张信息单告诉了你很多该带什么衣服。但其他方面呢?
content.en_text: The information sheet tells you a lot about what clothing to bring ... but what about other things?

content.cn_text: 塔默顿宅邸有自己的小店，但更大的店都在几英里外，所以你不会有很多机会买到日用品。
content.en_text: Well, Tamerton House has its own small shop, but anything bigger is several miles away so you won't have many opportunities for buying supplies.

content.cn_text: 所以在我演讲的最后一部分，我将解释你应该带什么东西去中心，如果你想的话，你可以带什么，而且，非常重要的是，你不能带什么。
content.en_text: So in this last part of my talk, I'm going to explain what objects you should take with you to the Centre, what you can take if you want and also, very importantly, what you cannot take.

content.cn_text: 在这次演讲之前，你们中的一些人来问我是否可以带一些东西，比如水壶，或者吹风机。
content.en_text: Several of you came up to me before this talk and asked whether you can take things like kettles, or hairdryers.

content.cn_text: 答案是，在中心有很多这样的电器，它们有合适的电压，并定期检查。
content.en_text: The answer is, there are plenty of these electrical appliances available in the Centre and they are of the proper voltage and are checked regularly.

content.cn_text: 你的可能不行，所以塔默顿的规定你不能带他们进来
content.en_text: Yours may not be, so the rules at Tamerton say you can't bring them into

content.cn_text: 中心……因为它被认为有火灾危险……记住这是一栋非常古老的房子。
content.en_text: the Centre ... because it's considered a fire risk ... remember it's a very old house.

content.cn_text: 另一个问题是关于手机的。
content.en_text: Now,another question was about cell phones.

content.cn_text: 虽然你不能在内部谈话时戴上它，但当你出去锻炼时，你同样需要它。所以恐怕它们是必须的。
content.en_text: Although you definitely can't have them on during inside talks, you equally definitely need them when you're out on exercises ... so they're a must, I'm afraid.

content.cn_text: 如果有人想和我谈谈借手机用两周的事，请在演讲结束后找我。
content.en_text: Anybody who wishes to talk to me about borrowing a phone for the fortnight, please see me after this talk.

content.cn_text: 现在，天气正在变热，你会在户外呆很长时间。
content.en_text: Now, the weather's heating up at the moment and you'll be outdoors a great deal.

content.cn_text: 如果你穿着合适的衣服，尤其是戴着帽子，防晒霜是可以选择的。
content.en_text: If you wear proper clothing, especially a hat, sun cream is optional.

content.cn_text: 商店里也有卖高因子面霜，所以你不用自己带，除非你用的是特殊的。
content.en_text: Also they sell high-factor cream in the shop so you don't have to take any of your own, unless there's a special kind you use.

content.cn_text: 现在有一个特别的说明，比如装在气雾罐里的除臭剂——我需要告诉你，这些在中心是被禁止的，因为它们显然有触发火警的习惯。
content.en_text: Now there's a special note about things like deodorants which come in aerosol cans - I need to tell you that these are banned in the Centre because apparently they have the habit of setting off the fire alarms.

content.cn_text: 如果你想带一个气雾剂罐，你实际上有被要求离开的风险。
content.en_text: If you want to take an aerosol can, you'll actually be at risk of being told to leave.

content.cn_text: 最后，人们一直在问他们是否需要带毛巾。嗯，中心确实为每位客人提供了一条毛巾，您需要自己洗。
content.en_text: And finally, people having been asking about whether they need to take towels.Well, the Centre does provide one towel per guest, which you're required to wash yourself.

content.cn_text: 如果你对此感到满意，那就不要再带了。
content.en_text: If you're happy with that then don't bring another.

content.cn_text: 如果没有，那就用你自己的吧。
content.en_text: If not, take one of your own.

content.cn_text: 记住你要做多少户外运动……你会变得又脏又湿……
content.en_text: Just remember how much outdoor exercise you'll be doing ... and how dirty and wet you'll be getting ...

groups.desc:
Questions 11-15
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: The Tamerton Centre was set up in order to encourage people

options.title: A
options.content: to enjoy being in the countryside.

options.title: C
options.content: to learn more about the countryside.

items.analysis: 文中明确提到Tamerton中心设立的初衷是让人们离开城市到乡村，体验户外生活的乐趣。这直接对应了选项A"to enjoy being in the countryside"（享受乡村生活）。原文使用"rewarding"（有收获的）来描述户外体验，这与"enjoy"（享受）的含义非常接近。因此，A选项最准确地概括了Tamerton中心设立的目的。

items.title: Last year's group said that the course

options.title: B
options.content: taught them lots of new skills.

items.analysis: 文中提到去年的小组虽然感到疲惫，但是课程让他们更多地了解自己，并增强了他们的自信。说话者强调这是"最重要的事情"。增强自信和了解自己直接关联到提高自尊，因此A选项"built their self esteem"最符合原文意思。

items.title: For the speaker, what's the most special feature of the course?

options.title: A
options.content: You can choose which activities you do.

options.title: B
options.content: There's such a wide variety of activities.

options.title: C
options.content: You can become an expert in new activities.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出，使这个地方特别的是每天可以尝试许多不同的事情。这直接对应了选项B中提到的"wide variety of activities"（各种各样的活动）。演讲者还举例说明了这种多样性，如攀岩和调查岩石池，进一步强调了活动的广泛性和多样性。因此，B选项最准确地反映了演讲者所强调的课程最特别的特征。

items.title: The speaker advises people to bring

options.title: C
options.content: a selection of films on DVD.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出桌游的棋子经常会丢失，并建议学生自己带一些。这直接对应了选项A "their own board games"。相比之下，其他物品如乒乓球设备和DVD都不需要自带，因此A选项是最符合原文内容的答案。

items.title: Bed-time is strictly enforced because

options.title: A
options.content: it's a way to reduce bad behaviour.

options.title: C
options.content: it makes it easy to check everyone's in.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出就寝时间被严格执行的原因是组织者需要确保所有未成年团队成员都在屋内。这直接对应了C选项"it makes it easy to check everyone's in"。原文中的"accounted for"（被核实）与选项中的"check everyone's in"（检查所有人是否在内）在意思上是一致的。因此，C是最准确的答案。

groups.desc:
Questions 16-20
What rules apply to taking different objects to the Centre?
Match each object with the correct rule, A-C.
Write the correct letter, A-C.
Objects

list.title: B
list.content: You CAN take this, if you wish

items.title: Electrical equipment
items.analysis: 文中明确指出不能带自己的电器设备进入中心。原因有两个：一是中心已经提供了足够的、经过检查的电器；二是自带的电器可能存在火灾隐患。这些说明表明电器设备属于不允许带入的物品，因此正确答案是C（You must NOT take this）。

items.title: Mobile phone
items.analysis: 文中明确指出手机在户外活动时是必需的，并且用"a must"这个短语强调了这一点。虽然在室内讲座时不能使用手机，但在户外活动时手机是必须携带的物品。这表明手机属于必须带到中心的物品，符合选项A的描述。

items.title: Sun cream
items.analysis: 文中明确指出防晒霜是"optional"（可选的），并且说明"you don't have to take any of your own"（你不必自己带）。这表明带防晒霜是一个选择，而不是必须的。同时，文中提到"unless there's a special kind you use"（除非你使用特殊种类的防晒霜），这进一步说明如果需要，是可以带的。因此，防晒霜属于"可以带，如果你愿意"的类别，对应选项B。

items.title: Aerosol deodorant
items.analysis: 文中明确指出气雾罐装除臭剂在中心是被禁止的（"banned in the Centre"），并且解释了原因是因为它们可能会触发火警。更进一步，讲话者还强调如果带这类物品可能会被要求离开。这些信息都清楚地表明气雾除臭剂是绝对不允许带入中心的，因此正确答案是C（You must NOT take this）。

items.title: Towel
items.analysis: 文中明确指出中心会提供毛巾，但同时也给出了选择：如果对中心提供的毛巾不满意，可以自带毛巾。这表明带毛巾是一个选择，而不是强制性的要求或禁止事项。因此，正确答案是B选项，即"You CAN take this, if you wish"（如果你愿意，你可以带这个）。
